broad_results.title: Audits | Avantis
broad_results.content: Our live contracts have gone through two security audits with Zellic as well Zokyo, who collectively have covered protocols such as Solana, Pyth, Sushiswap, etc. We're adding our security audit reports from both auditors, as well as our partnership announcements here · Zokyo: https://twitter.com/avantisfinance/status/1750322630631268631

broad_results.title: Avantis AI
broad_results.content: “Avantis' ability to instantly analyze SEC and SEDAR+ filings, combined with its robust corporate intelligence tools, allows us to uncover insights that would otherwise take weeks to compile.”

followup_results.title: Sherlock
followup_results.content: A C4 code contest is an event in which community participants, referred to as Wardens, review, audit, or analyze smart contract logic in exchange for a bounty provided by sponsoring projects. During the code contest outlined in this document, C4 conducted an analysis of the Sherlock smart contract system written in Solidity. The code contest took place between July 21—July 28. 14 Wardens contributed reports to the Sherlock code contest:

followup_results.content: Interested in competitive audits? View all current, upcoming, and past Code4rena audits in one convenient location.

followup_results.title: Sherlock contest Findings & Analysis Report
followup_results.content: Hence, we set it to the next lowest // possible value LIVENESS, // Proposal liveness address(sherlockCore), // Sherlock core address 0 // price ); where BOND becomes the reward and the actual bond for UMA is 1. Ideally, it should be set to 0, but if set as such, UMA interprets it to use the final fee as the bond amount instead. [request.bond = bond != 0 ? bond : finalFee;](https://github.com/UMAprotocol/protocol/blob/master/packages/core/contracts/oracle/implementation/SkinnyOptimisticOracle.sol#L321)

followup_results.title: Comparison guide of crowdsourced audits: Code4rena vs Sherlock
followup_results.content: If a project that’s been audited by Sherlock is exploited, it provides coverage, ensuring peace of mind for developers and stakeholders alike. ... Versatility for All: Catering to a broad audience, Code4rena is more focused on beginners, so it may be a better fit if you are new to smart contract auditing.
